result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 25:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS event_time,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_event_count
  FROM assignment_events
  GROUP BY case_id
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  -- cases with exactly one owner assignment event
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM c.ownerid) AS owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = c.id
  WHERE ac.assignment_event_count = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate AS event_time,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_event_count
  FROM assignment_events
  GROUP BY case_id
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  -- cases with exactly one owner assignment event
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM c.ownerid) AS owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = c.id
  WHERE ac.assignment_event_count = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS event_time,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_event_count
  FROM assignment_events
  GROUP BY case_id
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM c.ownerid) AS owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = c.id
  WHERE ac.assignment_event_count = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_event_count
  FROM assignment_events
  GROUP BY case_id
)
SELECT assignment_event_count, COUNT(*) AS cases
FROM assignment_counts
GROUP BY assignment_event_count
ORDER BY assignment_event_count;

args.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_closed,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')) AS closed_in_window
FROM "Case"
WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_closed,
       COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')) AS closed_in_window
FROM "Case"
WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL;

args.query:
WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_event_count
  FROM assignment_events
  GROUP BY case_id
)
SELECT ac.assignment_event_count, COUNT(*) AS cases_closed_in_window
FROM "Case" c
JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = c.id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
GROUP BY ac.assignment_event_count
ORDER BY ac.assignment_event_count;

WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_event_count
  FROM assignment_events
  GROUP BY case_id
)
SELECT ac.assignment_event_count, COUNT(*) AS cases_closed_in_window
FROM "Case" c
JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = c.id
WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
  AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
GROUP BY ac.assignment_event_count
ORDER BY ac.assignment_event_count;

args.query:
WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS event_time,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.newvalue__c) AS new_owner_id,
    TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.oldvalue__c) AS old_owner_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_event_count
  FROM assignment_events
  GROUP BY case_id
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM c.ownerid) AS owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = c.id
  WHERE ac.assignment_event_count = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM non_transferred_cases
GROUP BY owner_id
ORDER BY case_count DESC, agent_id
LIMIT 20;

WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,

non_transferred_cases AS (

         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,

  FROM "Case" c
  JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = c.id
  WHERE ac.assignment_event_count = 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
)
SELECT owner_id AS agent_id, COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM non_transferred_cases
GROUP BY owner_id
ORDER BY case_count DESC, agent_id
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_event_count
  FROM assignment_events
  GROUP BY case_id
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM c.ownerid) AS owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assignment_event_count,0) <= 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH assignment_events AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE LOWER(TRIM(BOTH FROM ch.field__c)) IN ('owner','ownerid','owner assignment','ownerid__c')
),
assignment_counts AS (
  SELECT case_id, COUNT(*) AS assignment_event_count
  FROM assignment_events
  GROUP BY case_id
),
non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         TRIM(BOTH FROM c.ownerid) AS owner_id
  FROM "Case" c
  LEFT JOIN assignment_counts ac ON ac.case_id = c.id
  WHERE COALESCE(ac.assignment_event_count,0) <= 1
    AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
),
per_agent AS (
  SELECT owner_id AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id AS "Id"
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
